name: Yihai Kerry Arawana Holdings Co., Ltd
summary: Yihai Kerry Arawana Holdings Co., Ltd engages in the agribusiness and food processing activities in the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in the research and development, production, and sale of kitchen foods, feed ingredients, and oleochemicals. It offers packaged oil, rice, flour, fine dried noodles, seasonings, and daily chemicals; and specialty oil, industry chocolate, flour, syrup, starch, vegetable protein, Vitamin E, lecithin, food grade glycerol, monoglyceride, ground rice powder, edible alcohol, cereal, premix powder, etc. for baking, confectionery and chocolate, dairy, dietary supplement, beverages, brewing, frying, liquid non-dairy creamer, frozen food, seasoning and other non-food domains, etc. applications. The company also provides feedstuff, such as soybean meal, rapeseed meal, cottonseed meal, FFS, PKE, SPC and by-products of rice, wheat and corn, fatty acid calcium, etc.; edible oils, rice, flour, sauces and detergents, etc. to the catering industry; and bakery products. In addition, it offers packaging materials comprising preforms, lifting rings, handles, caps, BIBs, and other plastic products; and warehousing, trunk and urban transportation, wharf, container, railway, and shipping agency services. Further, the company imports and markets commodities consisting of Meadow Fresh pure milk, Wilmarchelsea Blackstrap molasses, White Wings flour, and Praise dressings, etc.; and provides purchase and storage network, grain trade management, grain and oil information study, and the operation and integrated management of futures and spot markets trading activities. It offers its products primarily under the Arawana, Olivoila, Orchid, Wonder Farm, Neptune, Fengyuan, Golden Delicious, Reyland, and Jiejin 100. The company is headquartered in Shanghai, China. Yihai Kerry Arawana Holdings Co., Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Bathos Company Limited.
